name: prabhdeep-tools
description: Prabhdeep Singh's personal Claude Code tools.

plugins.name: sonu
plugins.description: Prabhdeep (Sonu)'s personal Claude Code toolkit. Includes /sonu:ship — a PR babysitter that gathers Claude + every enabled AI reviewer (Copilot, CodeRabbit, Aikido, …), fixes/justifies/resolves every finding, loops until clean, then merges — autonomously and repo-agnostic — plus the code-standards skill that auto-applies Sonu's coding foundation to all AI-written code.
